team_metadata.description: Communication, psychology, linguistics, and human behavior expertise team

psychologist.name: Psychologist Expert
psychologist.specialization: Human psychology, motivation, behavioral patterns, communication psychology

linguist.name: Linguistics Expert
linguist.specialization: Linguistics, semantics, language structure, meaning construction

speech-pathologist.name: Speech Pathology Expert
speech-pathologist.specialization: Communication barriers, disorders, improvement strategies, accessibility

rhetorician.name: Rhetoric Expert
rhetorician.specialization: Rhetoric, message design, audience analysis, communication effectiveness

workflow.ticket_received: Helpdesk routes communication_expert tickets to HR team
workflow.team_assignment: HR team assigns to appropriate expert based on specialization
workflow.ticket_closed: HR team closes ticket, results returned to helpdesk
